name: Hamburg Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook hamburger and onion together, draining off excess fat.
2. Add salt and stir well to combine.
3. Place the mixture in a greased 9-inch pan and sprinkle cheese on top.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and biscuit mix until well combined.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the hamburger and onion filling.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 400°F for 25 minutes.
